scripts.format:rust: bash -lc 'for dir in wasm/*_signer; do (cd "$dir" && cargo fmt); done'
scripts.format:rust:check: bash -lc 'for dir in wasm/*_signer; do (cd "$dir" && cargo fmt -- --check); done'
scripts.lint:rust: bash -lc 'for dir in wasm/*_signer; do (cd "$dir" && cargo clippy --all-targets); done'
scripts.lint:rust:strict: bash -lc 'for dir in wasm/*_signer; do (cd "$dir" && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings); done'
scripts.type-check:relay-server: pnpm -C sdk exec tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && pnpm -C examples/relay-server exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.check: pnpm -s lint && pnpm -s format:check && pnpm -s type-check && pnpm -s format:rust:check && pnpm -s lint:rust && pnpm -s check:signing-architecture && pnpm -s check:signer-parity
scripts.site: concurrently --kill-others --names caddy,site,docs "pnpm run caddy" "VITE_RELAYER_URL=https://localhost:9444 VITE_SEAMS_BROKER_URL=https://localhost:9444 VITE_CONSOLE_BASE_URL=https://localhost:9444 VITE_WALLET_ORIGIN=https://localhost:8443 VITE_DOCS_ORIGIN=https://docs.localhost VITE_RP_ID_BASE=localhost VITE_ROR_ALLOWED_ORIGINS=https://docs.localhost pnpm -C examples/seams-site vite" "pnpm run docs:dev"
scripts.server: pnpm -C examples/relay-server postgres:up && HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=8444 EXPECTED_ORIGIN=https://localhost EXPECTED_WALLET_ORIGIN=https://localhost:8443 pnpm -C examples/relay-server dev
scripts.server:3-relays: pnpm -C examples/relay-server postgres:up && HOST=127.0.0.1 EXPECTED_ORIGIN=https://localhost EXPECTED_WALLET_ORIGIN=https://localhost:8443 pnpm -C examples/relay-server dev:threshold:3relays
scripts.server:iphone: pnpm -C examples/relay-server postgres:up && HOST=0.0.0.0 EXPECTED_ORIGIN=https://pta-m4.local EXPECTED_WALLET_ORIGIN=https://pta-m4.local:8443 pnpm -C examples/relay-server dev
scripts.benchmark:ecdsa-hss:wasm: bash -lc 'if [ -z "${CC_wasm32_unknown_unknown:-}" ] && [ -x /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang ]; then export CC_wasm32_unknown_unknown=/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang; fi; cd wasm/eth_signer && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg && cd ../hss_client_signer && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg && cd ../.. && node ./benchmarks/ecdsa-hss-wasm/src/runner.mjs'
